---
title: "Course overview"
navbar: false
---

## Overview

BMC201 Web Technology is a 4-credit course (3-1-0) for MCA Semester 2 students at Galgotias College of Engineering & Technology, following the AKTU MCA Model Curriculum 2020-21.

This course introduces modern web development with both front-end and back-end technologies. Students will learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSP/Servlets, Spring, and REST APIs through lectures, labs, and assignments.

## Learning Outcomes

By the end of this course, students will be able to:

- Build responsive web pages using HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap.
- Create interactive UI behaviour with JavaScript and DOM manipulation.
- Develop server-side applications using JSP, Servlets, and Spring Boot.
- Work with databases and web server deployment basics.
- Apply web standards, architecture principles, and debugging practices.

## Class meetings

| | Day | Time | Location |
|---|---|---|---|
| Lecture | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| Lab | TBA | TBA | TBA |

## Teaching team

| Role | Name | Office hours | Location |
|---|---|---|---|
| Instructor | [Mr. Prashant Kumar Nag](https://prashantnag.com) | By appointment | Room A06, Dept. of Computer Applications |

**Email:** [prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu](mailto:prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu)

Typical response time: 24–48 hours on weekdays.

## Course materials

All required materials (lecture notes, lab sheets, assignment instructions) will be posted on this website. Official announcements and submission links are on Moodle.

## Getting help

- **Email** the instructor for individual questions.
- **Office hours** — see the table above.
- Check the [Resources](/resource/index.qmd) page for additional references and tools.
